dict.string: Cloak Picker reads the configured default extension folder when it is stored in iCloud Drive.
Cloak Picker can be launched from Desktop and may read local picker resources.
Cloak Picker may inspect local extension files selected for account isolation.
ChatGPT voice input uses the microphone.
ChatGPT video and vision features use the camera.
Passkey sign-in uses Bluetooth to connect your phone or security key.
